title: Faithfull FAITAPEJOINO Plasterers Jointing Tape, Drywall Adhesive Mesh for Plastering & Patching Tasks – Orange 48mm x 90M
features: Multipurpose Application - The Faithfull Drywall Adhesive Mesh Tape is perfect for plastering, patching, covering cracks, joints, and holes on plasterboard surfaces. The jointing tape is highly effective in strengthening joints, fixing holes, and giving a seamless texture to plasterboard surfaces.
High-Tac Performance in Extreme Temperatures - The tape’s strong, high-tac adhesive ensures a firm grip and reliable hold on surfaces, even in extreme temperatures, from -10°C to 70°C.
Bright Orange for Enhanced Visibility - The vibrant orange colour makes it easy to spot and apply, even in low-light conditions.

Reliable, Durable & Easy to Use - The robust 48mm wide mesh construction ensures strength and durability and provides reliable coverage during use. The adhesive backing firmly bonds to the wall, allowing for quick and easy application.
Professional Quality – The self-adhesive tape delivers superior performance for both home DIY enthusiasts or professional traders, providing a fast and easy solution to jointing tasks.
description: The Faithfull Drywall Adhesive Mesh Tape is a multipurpose tape designed for plastering and patching tasks. The jointing tape is highly effective in strengthening joints, fixing holes, and giving a seamless texture to plasterboard surfaces. The high-visibility tape features a robust 48mm mesh construction to provide reliable and durable coverage, and its high-tac adhesive ensures a firm grip on surfaces, even in extreme temperatures. The adhesive backing firmly bonds to the wall, allowing for quick and easy application. Easy to spot and apply, this reliable, high-visibility mesh tape makes jointing tasks easier, quicker, and more effective. Colour: Orange. Width: 48mm. Length: 90M
